candidates.label: Nano remote-monitoring-and-data overview-card Candidate
candidates.responseText: I have created this thumbnail of a rugged industrial tablet featuring a dark-mode geographical map of the Seattle area. The interface includes glowing cyan and amber telemetry nodes that represent key industrial sites like data centers and ports, fulfilling the remote monitoring dashboard theme you described. Note that the background features a work glove and desk elements to anchor the tablet in a professional, field-service environment.

candidates.label: Nano remote-monitoring-and-data overview-card Candidate
candidates.notes: Global Pro-model visual upgrade. STRICT REQUIREMENT: NO EMBEDDED TEXT, NO SLOGANS, NO LOGOS, NO UI ELEMENTS.

candidates.label: Nano remote-monitoring-and-data overview-card Candidate
candidates.prompt:
{
  "asset_type": "service overview card thumbnail",
  "goal": "A sleek tablet or secondary monitor displaying a map with multiple glowing nodes/sites. THE IMAGE MUST BE COMPLETELY FREE OF ANY EMBEDDED TEXT, SLOGANS, LOGOS, BUTTONS, OR WEBSITE UI ELEMENTS.",
  "technical_signals": {
    "lens": "50mm",
    "aperture": "f/4",
    "light_source": "screen glow"
  },
  "spatial_positioning": [
    "device angled in frame, displaying a dark-mode geographical map with data nodes"
  ],
  "color_restriction": "dark UI, bright glowing telemetry nodes (cyan, amber).",
  "scene": "An industrial tablet displaying a wide-area remote telemetry and monitoring dashboard.",
  "reality_anchors": [
    "geographical map UI with industrial assets",
    "rugged tablet bezel"
  ],
  "composition": {
    "format": "3:2",
    "focal_structure": "device screen filling the frame diagonally"
  },
  "avoid": [
    "Google Maps street view",
    "consumer iPads",
    "generic app interfaces",
    "embedded text",
    "slogans",
    "logos",
    "buttons",
    "CTA elements",
    "website UI overlays",
    "graphic design artifacts",
    "watermarks",
    "HUD decorations on screens",
    "fake headlines"
  ]
}
candidates.notes: Global Pro-model visual upgrade. STRICT REQUIREMENT: NO EMBEDDED TEXT, NO SLOGANS, NO LOGOS, NO UI ELEMENTS.
